★ star = Easy mode favorite. Weight = relative probability. Goes to = branch on land.
⚖ Consistency Matrix
Hard Blocks
Toggle on/off. When on, these combinations auto-reroll or skip.
Anorexic / Bulimic + Cup E and above
Hard cap at D cup
Anorexic / Bulimic + Huge / Obscene ass

Difficulty Multipliers
How much rare segments are boosted in Hard and Extreme modes.
⚡ Hard mode boost 6×
Applied to segments in lowest 40% of weights
☠ Extreme mode boost 25×
Applied to segments in lowest 20% of weights

★ Preferences
Easy Mode Favorites
Star your favorite segments in the Edit panel. Easy mode gives them 4x boost.
Difficulty Guide
Medium — Default weights, no adjustment.
Easy — Starred favorites get 4x boost.
Hard — Rare segments (bottom 40%) get 3x boost.
Extreme — Rarest segments (bottom 20%) get 10x boost.
Random — Each wheel gets a random 0.5x–5x multiplier.
